title: Custom Black Neoprene Cosmetic Bag with Zipper | OEM Makeup Bag Manufacturer
seoTitle: Custom Neoprene Cosmetic Bag Manufacturer | OEM Waterproof Makeup Bags
description:
This custom black neoprene cosmetic bag is designed for beauty brands, promotional companies, retailers, and wholesalers looking for a stylish, durable, and lightweight cosmetic pouch. Made from premium neoprene material, the bag offers excellent flexibility, water resistance, and shock protection while maintaining a modern minimalist appearance.

The spacious main compartment easily stores cosmetics, skincare products, makeup brushes, toiletries, travel essentials, and personal accessories. A smooth zipper closure keeps belongings secure, while the soft neoprene construction makes the bag comfortable to carry and easy to clean.

As a professional cosmetic bag manufacturer, we provide complete OEM and ODM services, including custom sizes, colors, logo printing, embossed logos, zipper colors, inner lining, labels, packaging, and material options to meet your brand requirements.
seoDescription: Custom neoprene cosmetic bag manufacturer offering OEM & ODM makeup bags with custom logo, size, color and packaging. Lightweight, waterproof and perfect for beauty brands, wholesalers and promotional gifts.
